description_long: This is a single bed frame with a classic, ornate design, painted in a soft white color. The headboard and footboard both feature raised paneling and decorative floral carvings, giving the bed a vintage or French country aesthetic. The frame is supported by four turned legs, each with rounded finials at the top, adding to its traditional charm. The side rails and slatted base are visible, with the slats made of a lighter wood, providing support for a mattress. The bed does not currently have a mattress or any bedding, leaving the slatted support structure exposed. The overall construction appears to be solid wood, finished with a matte or slightly smooth paint.
description: A white, ornately carved wooden bed frame with a slatted base, featuring both a decorative headboard and footboard. The frame is traditional in style and lacks a mattress or bedding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed headboard with floral carvings and the full slatted base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the length of the bed, the slatted support system, and the profile of both headboard and footboard.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the footboard and the simple, unadorned rear panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slatted base and the decorative side profile.
